mapper.select:
SELECT p.id AS profile_id, u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.name, u.email, p.phone, d.name AS department_name, pos.name AS position_name, u.role, p.profile_image_path, p.joined_date FROM itsm_users u LEFT JOIN gw_user_profiles p ON u.id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN gw_departments d ON p.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN gw_positions pos ON p.position_id = pos.id WHERE u.active = true
AND ( u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') )
ORDER BY u.name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_user_profiles (user_id, department_id, position_id, phone, joined_date, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, #{phone}, CAST(#{joinedDate} AS DATE) NULL , NOW()) ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET department_id = EXCLUDED.department_id, position_id = EXCLUDED.position_id, phone = EXCLUDED.phone, joined_date = EXCLUDED.joined_date, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.name, d.parent_id, u.name AS manager_name, d.contact, d.location, d.sort_order, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_user_profiles p2 WHERE p2.department_id = d.id) AS member_count FROM gw_departments d LEFT JOIN itsm_users u ON d.manager_id = u.id ORDER BY d.sort_order, d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_departments (name, parent_id, manager_id, contact, location, sort_order, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{managerId}, #{contact}, #{location}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_departments SET name = #{name}, parent_id = #{parentId}, manager_id = #{managerId}, contact = #{contact}, location = #{location}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, level, approval_rank FROM gw_positions ORDER BY level
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_positions (name, level, approval_rank, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{level}, #{approvalRank}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, department_id, description, created_at FROM gw_boards ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_boards (name, department_id, description, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{departmentId}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, capacity, location, description, created_at FROM gw_meeting_rooms ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_meeting_rooms (name, capacity, location, description, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{capacity}, #{location}, #{description}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_user_profiles SET profile_image_path = #{imagePath}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM itsm_users WHERE active = true) AS "totalUsers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM itsm_users WHERE active = true AND last_login_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days') AS "activeUsers", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_notices) AS "totalNotices", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_posts) AS "totalPosts", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_approval_documents WHERE status = 'PENDING') AS "pendingApprovals", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_files) AS "totalFiles"
